task_completion.description: Target URL is entered into Screaming Frog
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog SEO Spider is open and 'https://crawler-test.com/' is visible in the URL input bar at the top.

task_completion.description: The crawl of the target website is completed
task_completion.visual_evidence: The crawl progress bar in the Screaming Frog interface shows 100% completion.
The 'Crawl Analysis' progress bar shows 100%, or the 'Crawl Analysis' > 'Start' menu option is actively being clicked. This step is required to populate canonical chain data.

task_completion.description: The Canonical Chains report is exported as a CSV
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or file manager shows the file 'canonical_chains_audit.csv' being saved to or existing in the '~/Documents/SEO/reports/' directory. This is typically accessed via Reports > Canonicals > Canonical Chains.

task_completion.description: A summary text file containing the total number of chains is created
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window shows the creation or content of 'chain_summary.txt' in '~/Documents/SEO/reports/' containing a numeric value representing the total chains found.

integrity.description: Agent used the Screaming Frog GUI to perform the crawl and export
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the agent interacting with the Screaming Frog application (e.g., clicking 'Start', navigating the 'Reports' menu, using the save dialog) rather than generating fake CSV files via terminal scripts.

integrity.description: The crawl data reflects the actual target website
integrity.visual_evidence: The main pane of the Screaming Frog interface should display actual URLs from the 'crawler-test.com' domain, confirming a real crawl took place.

integrity.description: Agent derived the total chains from the actual report or UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen opening the exported CSV, viewing the specific Canonical Chains report in the UI, or using a command to count the rows in the CSV before writing the number into 'chain_summary.txt'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://crawler-test.com/. Target Domain: crawler-test.com. Report Path: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/canonical_chains_audit.csv. Summary Path: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/chain_summary.txt. The target website is a real, public site designed for testing web crawlers and contains actual canonical chains. In Screaming Frog, identifying canonical chains requires running a 'Crawl Analysis' after the initial crawl finishes. The report is typically exported via the top menu: Reports > Canonicals > Canonical Chains.
